external_advisory.summary: Live Hermes chief MCP/skills reconciliation must remain blocked while independent GAC/Claude gate is unavailable. Codex GPT-5.5 xhigh fallback is Grade-C and cannot clear high-risk live control-plane changes.

blocked_live_actions.reason: agent.mcp_config has executable-config semantics in at least one backend and must not be used for summary metadata without an approved schema and independent gate.
Even restrictive or boundary-only skills change live chief prompt and behavior surface.
Treating Hermes local config as Multica-visible truth weakens the current source-of-truth rule and may create false compliance.
The live drift is unresolved; static proposal work cannot change the dry-run decision.
Grade-C fallback may critique static artifacts but cannot approve high-risk live control-plane mutation.

source_of_truth_matrix.current_truth: Hermes local config plus Multica agent model field
unresolved split between Hermes local config and Multica-visible metadata
source_of_truth_matrix.current_state: Hermes local config names chatgptrest; Multica agent.mcp_config is null

source_of_truth_matrix.current_truth: unresolved split between Hermes local skills/external dirs and Multica workspace skill assignment
source_of_truth_matrix.current_state: Hermes has local/external skills; Multica agent skills are empty

required_before_any_live_reconciliation: Independent GAC/Claude gate recovers or user explicitly authorizes an equivalent independent high-risk gate.
Approved source-of-truth decision for Hermes MCP and skills visibility.
Approved schema separating non-executable metadata from executable MCP config.
Skill content review with hashes, assignment scope, and rollback plan.
Secret-safe MCP contract if executable MCP config is ever used.
Rollback command or manual rollback runbook.
Recorded user approval if independent gate remains unavailable.

rollback_plan_draft.mcp_config: If a future approved change writes agent.mcp_config, rollback must restore the exact previous null state and rerun live snapshot plus dry-run.
rollback_plan_draft.skills: If a future approved change assigns skills, rollback must restore the exact previous empty assignment list and rerun live snapshot plus dry-run.
rollback_plan_draft.checker: If a future approved change relaxes checker source-of-truth rules, rollback must restore high-drift blocking and rerun self-tests plus live no-op dry-run.

user_confirmation_required: Whether a named alternative independent gate may replace GAC while GAC has quota failures.
Whether the user explicitly authorizes any live chief metadata mutation under degraded review.
Whether Multica or Hermes local config should be source of truth for Hermes MCP and skills visibility.
Whether agent.mcp_config is allowed to store only executable MCP config or can also store non-executable metadata.
Whether workspace skills may be assigned to chief before GAC recovers.
